Raccoon City Bioweapon Research - Report
An elite soldier with an axe and a gas mask enters the room.

He charges at Leon with the axe, dodging his shots, and a fight ensues. They exchange high-precision blows, after which Leon throws the soldier onto a glass panel, smashing through it, and they fall into an inner area lit only by red lights.
He draws two knives—one regular, one with a curved tip. The fight continues.
They exchange blows.
Sensing he is losing, the soldier breaks a pipe, plunging the battlefield into a red mist.
However, Leon manages to drive his axe into the soldier’s throat. The soldier falls to the floor. Leon takes the fallen enemy’s axe.

Finally, he reaches Pandora, a circular room with a platform in the center reached by a long bridge. The room is bathed in golden light, and red plastic spheres line the walls. An unusual control panel is installed on the platform. Zeno and Grace are standing there.
He presses a button, revealing a keyboard on the control panel. A question is displayed on the screen.
Leon enters. He aims his gun at Zeno.
He deftly dodges the shots and presses his horrific revolver to Leon’s head, who doesn’t even flinch.

With a swift motion, he draws his axe and severs Zeno’s gun hand, but Zeno quickly strikes Leon in the throat and reattaches his hand. The fight continues, but Leon takes a powerful blow to the chest and spits blood. Zeno prepares to kill him.
She presses Leon’s fallen gun to her own head.
Zeno is distracted, or he uses this moment. He draws his massive pistol and fires at a joint in a metal structure on the right side of the platform. The structure begins to fall. Leon grabs Grace.

He grabs onto the structure, and as it swings to the other side, it braces against the far part of the room. They slide down, smashing through red spheres, then jump onto a small platform that runs along the wall. Zeno aims to shoot but decides against it at the last moment. The platform enters a tunnel. Leon coughs.
They jump down into a room filled with various debris and trash, as well as some organic matter covering the entire floor.
He loses consciousness and falls into the filth.
Grace sits beside Leon’s body, hugging her knees, not knowing what to do. After a while, Leon regains consciousness. Black veins now also cover part of Leon’s face.
Leon ponders the answer.
Leon coughs and stands up heavily, picking up his gun.
She helps him up.
Leon thinks for a few seconds.
And... we switch to Grace. First, they need to find a way out of this dump.
They find a ventilation shaft.
He kneels heavily and cups his hands.
Grace climbs into the shaft.
She makes her way through the tunnel and kicks out a ventilation grate...
...and she bravely, without a shadow of hesitation, jumps down into the dimly lit corridors of the laboratory. She approaches a crane control panel.
Grace needs to find this key. She moves on.

In one room, she notices a Licker crawling on the glass outside. The dangerous creature certainly startles Grace, but not as much as before. Now she is cautious and observant. The Licker moves closer to her and sniffs the air.
She carefully creeps up behind the dangerous creature and injects a virus destroyer into its back, causing the crawling beast to explode. Afterwards, she has to fight several zombies.
She finds the key and raises the crane blocking Leon’s path.
She retrieves a special magnetic key from a panel that opens up.
She continues fighting, using a new weapon—acid bottles.
Monitor Control Room Safe
She enters a spacious room with slanted corners. In the far part is a computer with a hundred screens and a massive data center along the walls.
A disc in a plastic case emerges from the computer’s disc drive—Grace takes it and examines it carefully.
She remembers—it’s the same type of floppy disc her mother hid!

She swaps it for the one she found back at the hotel. On the disc, she finds many video files with alphanumeric names and plays one titled "the creator". In the video, an old man in a wheelchair sits by a window. Nearby sits Alyssa.
The recording stops.
She looks at a video titled "Grace"... and we switch to Leon.
The crane right in front of Leon rises, clearing the path.
He doubles over in pain and starts coughing.
He climbs the stairs into the laboratory.
Through a small window, he sees that very "Pandora"—the room bathed in golden light. But that platform is a dozen stories above him.
Several zombies attack him, but Leon’s body is at its limit—he has periodic coughing fits, blurred vision, and has to wait for these symptoms to pass, though in combat conditions, that’s not so easy.
However, there are many Lickers around.
He shoots them in the heads with his massive pistol, turning them into bloody messes.
He finds a key and activates the elevator.
Zombies start crawling out of containers. Leon coughs and draws his shotgun.
Leon enters the elevator, practically exhausted. He leans against the wall to keep from falling.
Leon has a severe coughing fit.
He somehow manages to reach Pandora, walking slowly as every step is an effort. He climbs the stairs, step by agonizing step.
Grace plays the video named after her.
A researcher brings a child to Spencer and hands her over.
She approaches and takes the child in her arms.
The video ends. Grace stares at the blank screen for a long time. Then she notices on the monitor screen, Lyon (Leon) struggling to climb the stairs. He is now vomiting blood.
Leon slides down the door to Pandora, never making it inside.

Letter from Patrick
She runs to Leon.
Leon slowly regains consciousness.
He coughs.
She takes Leon’s arm and helps him stand.
They slowly enter Pandora. Zeno is still standing there, smoking.
No longer having the strength to stand, Leon falls to the floor.
Zeno stubs out his cigarette.
Grace approaches the keyboard... she has a choice—enter the wrong code and destroy Elpis, or try to enter the correct one and release Elpis.
Grace remembers what she heard.
She types "HOPE" on the keyboard.
She presses the ENTER key.

The circular element in the center of the panel, connected to several metal tubes, begins to rotate slowly. Something is happening; the room seems to come alive. A minute passes, and someone enters, though we don’t yet see who. The circular element extends outward, revealing several sealed test tubes with flames inside.
Zeno shoves her away from the panel.
He injects the contents of a test tube into his neck. The black veins on his face disappear.
Something is happening to Zeno...
Zeno senses some changes. He takes off his glasses and approaches Grace.
He tries to attack Grace, but Leon, with his last ounce of strength, pushes him away. Zeno tries to use his powers, but nothing happens.
We finally learn who entered the room. It is Victor himself, looking battered from the recent explosion. He has lost an arm and is covered in wounds. Victor laughs and removes his helmet.
Zeno threateningly advances towards Victor.
He laughs.

Victor makes a sweeping motion—his arm regrows into a tentacle, and this tentacle severs Zeno’s head. His body falls helplessly to the floor. Grace clutches the test tube containing Elpis in her hands.
With a swift motion, Victor stabs Grace in the abdomen. She falls to one knee. Victor’s voice changes, becoming deeper.
She stabs the contents of the test tube into Leon’s arm. The black veins on his arm disappear.
He picks up one of the test tubes and presses several buttons on the keyboard.
Leon regains consciousness.

The platform begins to shake, and the iron bridges leading to it detach. This isn’t a controlled mechanism but destruction, as the platform tilts and crashes against the wall, destroying the red capsules.
The platform collapses. Leon successfully jumps off and lands on his feet.
Victor approaches him.
The long-awaited final battle begins!
Victor continues to mutate during the fight, gaining the ability to control electricity.
Leon picks up an RPG-7 lying on the floor and fires a rocket at the weakened Victor.
Victor grows several more tentacles, but his body can’t handle the strain, and he falls into the abyss.

Suddenly, a giant hand grips the platform. Victor, transformed into a monster the size of four stories, climbs onto the platform and clings on with tentacles to avoid falling off. Describing its form is absolutely impossible—the creature is abstract and extremely grotesque. But I’ll venture to guess it’s a giant bloody crab!

A truly bloody battle begins. The creature is literally a mass of meat with weak spots. Leon shoots at them, then climbs onto the monster, wielding his axe and covering himself in tens of liters of blood. The creature, once Victor, slams the ceiling in rage. Soon, it has no strength left to fight Leon. He blows off its limbs one by one, then aims at a huge, exposed bloody eye.
He fires. The creature explodes in a fountain of blood, and Leon, spinning his pistol on his finger, holsters it. Meanwhile, the ceiling threatens to collapse. Leon returns to searching for Grace.
He finds her lying on the floor in the far part of the room. Her arm is broken.
The ceiling is already cracking at the seams.
He lifts her, and Grace screams in pain.
Pieces of the ceiling fall away. Leon looks around—all exits seem blocked.
Leon shakes his head.
The lights gradually go out, plunging everything into darkness.

After a tense minute, a bright searchlight switches on somewhere above. Soldiers in unusual sand-colored uniforms with black cloaks descend into the room. Their faces are covered by balaclavas, and night vision devices cover their eyes.
He approaches Leon.
Some time passes. Our heroes are now on the surface, where military personnel are bustling about and heavy equipment has been brought in to clear the rubble.
He notices Grace sitting under a blanket, drinking a hot beverage.
He approaches Grace.
Grace smiles. As Leon leaves, he removes his gloves and throws them away. We see a news broadcast on the NTS channel with the headline "Bioweapons Lab Discovered in Raccoon City".
The next broadcast—"Recent Deaths Linked to Raccoon City Incident?"
Another news channel—"Investigation into Spencer and Umbrella Reopened"
Back to NTS—"Alyssa Ashcroft Killed in Cover-Up?"
Another channel—"President Denies Government Involvement"

Channel 24 World News—"YOUNG GIRL RESCUED FROM ’BIO-TERROR FRONT’ IN RHODES HILL". The video shows the sanatorium surrounded by police and medics. Emily is still inside the horrific monster she became and barely breathing. In the next scene, Grace returns to working on reports at the FBI. She’s talking on the phone with someone, possibly Leon.
Grace is distracted from the phone.

With confidence, she grabs a report and runs after her boss. On her desk are photos of her with her mother, and of her and Emily. Next, a short epilogue awaits us. Other soldiers approach the corpse of a BSAA soldier.
The second soldier takes something from the body of the slain BSAA soldier, perhaps removing a camera from his helmet.
Deciding to destroy Elpis, Grace hears other voices in her head.
She types the word "DESTRUCTION"
She presses the ENTER key. Power to the panel is cut off.
The room begins to collapse.
Zeno grabs Grace. While he is distracted, Leon runs up and buries his axe in his neck. Leon and Grace jump onto the falling metal bridges leading to the main laboratory.
However, the bridge tilts sharply upward. And Leon himself is in no hurry to follow Grace.
The platform in the center is about to collapse.
Zeno pulls the axe from his neck. Leon prepares for hand-to-hand combat, but Zeno is significantly faster and stronger. In the next clash, he breaks Leon’s arm.
Zeno lands numerous blows on Leon, breaking ribs. Leon falls to his knees.
Zeno draws his revolver.

He shoots Leon in the head, blowing it to pieces. Then the platform falls and explodes, killing Zeno. Grace sobs over the fallen Leon. Lost in grim thoughts, she makes her way to the surface, where a helicopter awaits her.
